### CHAPTER 3 E+W APPLICATIONS FOR FINANCIAL REMEDIES FOR CHILDREN


### Application by parent, guardian etc for financial remedy in respect of children E+W


9.10. —(1) The following people may apply for a financial remedy in respect of a child—


[ F26 (1A) Where the application is—


the child does not require permission to make the application. ]


F27 (2) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
